title: mariana lactea
intro: Mariana lactea, also known as the milk flower, is a flowering plant native to the tropical forests of the Philippines. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Mariana lactea include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, with herbal preparations often used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
